---
title: "Empirical Case Studies"
short-title: "Case Studies"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "OPEC quotas, climate negotiations, and the Cuban Missile Crisis as signaling games."
keywords: ["case studies", "OPEC", "climate", "Cuban Missile Crisis", "signaling"]
---

# Empirical Case Studies {#sec-case-studies}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
